items.name_en: New Crescent Bag🎉1BH222 Multi-functional🎉🎉
items.name_cn:
New Crescent Bag🎉1BH222 Multi-functional🎉🎉
This Re-Nylon bag is crafted from recycled nylon, refined and versatile, blending archival aesthetics with practical contemporary style. The crescent silhouette features a detachable sporty shoulder strap and an elegant chain handle, offering versatile carrying options. Crossbody/Shoulder/Clutch/Handheld, it's perfect 😘😘 Ladies, get yours now 🎉🎉
30x13.5x6cm 🎉🎉🎉

New Spring Collection Prada
5008 # Size: 31*22*12
Counter-cut craftsmanship, featuring imported calfskin 🐮 paired with python print 🐍, soft texture. Fashionable and elegant bag shape [Rose] Play with the fashion forefront [Beer] Original counter hardware [Heart] Soft and comfortable to the touch, perfect details, extra-large capacity, internal divider, comes with dust bag, official website card, and certificate. Adhering to high quality
